{{CargoRelic
|name=Jack's Typewriter
|class_id=22477
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-07
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Aug 7, 1980 AD, Jack suddenly starts to wildly hammer on the typewriter.<br>Jack is a writer who loves writing and dreams of writing great work. To do this, he takes a job looking after a hotel. After he and his family move into the hotel, they encounter various strange events. Eventually, under great pressure, Jack embarks on a path of madness and destruction.
|fame=28
|art=31
|fth=25
|civ=47
|tech=23
|ss1=Mutant Minion HP +1%
|ss2=Mutant Minion HP +2%
|ss3=Mutant Minion HP +3%
|ss4=Mutant Minion HP +5%
|ss7=Mutant Minion HP +5%<br>Mutant Minion HP +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Swampsanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Swamp Sanctum: Swamp Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
